items.title: Tight security as Indian students resit medical exam after alleged paper leak
items.summary: Millions of candidates face biometric checks and frisking as air force deployed to secure exam papers.

items.title: Thawing Permafrost Not Only Emits CO2, It Absorbs it Too, Shows Landmark Study
items.summary: Thawing permafrost is considered a growing source of greenhouse gases as our climate warms and releases ancient carbon once stored in the frozen soils. But a new study reveals an overlooked plus side:…
